text:
Created attachment 232283
v1

Moin moin

desktop@ would like to ask for an exp-run to update x11-toolkits/pango to 1.50.5. 

The patch is attached, and can also be found here:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-x11-toolkits-pango-update-to-1.50.5.patch

mfg Tobias
